name: total_insert_events
description: Count of editor insert operations.

name: total_delete_events
description: Count of editor delete operations.

name: total_copy_events
description: Count of copy events inside the managed editor.

name: total_paste_events
description: Count of paste events inside the managed editor.

name: avg_paste_length
description: Average characters per paste event.

name: max_paste_length
description: Maximum characters observed in a single paste.

name: paste_to_insert_ratio
description: Paste events divided by insert events.

name: undo_events
description: Count of undo operations.

name: redo_events
description: Count of redo operations.

name: run_compile_events
description: Count of run, compile, debug, or test starts.

name: avg_typing_speed
description: Average typed characters per active minute.

name: typing_burst_count
description: Number of typing bursts separated by pauses.

name: typing_pause_frequency
description: Count of pauses between typing bursts.

name: avg_pause_duration
description: Average pause duration in seconds between typing bursts.

name: longest_pause
description: Longest pause observed between typing bursts.

name: key_latency_mean
description: Mean inter-edit latency in milliseconds.

name: key_latency_variance
description: Variance of inter-edit latency in milliseconds.

name: paste_after_idle_time
description: Average idle time before a paste event.

name: typing_vs_paste_ratio
description: Typed characters divided by pasted characters.

name: code_edit_distance
description: Normalized edit distance between first and final code states.

name: total_code_versions
description: Number of captured code versions or snapshots.

name: avg_lines_added_per_revision
description: Average lines added per revision.

name: avg_lines_removed_per_revision
description: Average lines removed per revision.

name: refactor_frequency
description: Count of refactor operations or refactor-like rewrites.

name: compile_error_count
description: Aggregate compile or diagnostics error count.

name: error_fix_time
description: Average seconds from error state to clean diagnostics or successful run.

name: code_rewrite_ratio
description: Share of changed lines that were rewritten rather than appended.

name: function_rewrite_count
description: Count of functions whose bodies were substantially rewritten.

name: comment_addition_count
description: Count of comments added over the session.

name: total_prompts_sent
description: Count of prompts sent to managed AI surfaces.

name: avg_prompt_length
description: Average prompt length in characters.

name: max_prompt_length
description: Maximum prompt length in characters.

name: prompt_similarity_to_problem
description: Average semantic overlap between prompts and the task statement.

name: prompt_refinement_count
description: Count of prompt follow-ups that refine earlier prompts.

name: prompt_entropy
description: Normalized lexical entropy across prompts.

name: clarification_prompt_ratio
description: Share of prompts classified as clarification-seeking.

name: solution_request_ratio
description: Share of prompts classified as asking for direct solutions.

name: debugging_prompt_ratio
description: Share of prompts classified as debugging-oriented.

name: ai_response_acceptance_rate
description: Accepted AI responses divided by total AI responses.

name: ai_output_edit_distance
description: Average character-level edit distance between AI output and user-retained code.

name: prompt_to_code_latency
description: Average seconds from prompt submission to the next coding action.

name: session_duration
description: Session duration in seconds.

name: time_to_first_code
description: Seconds from session start to first code edit.

name: time_to_first_ai_prompt
description: Seconds from session start to first AI prompt.

name: ai_usage_early_ratio
description: Share of AI prompts sent in the first quarter of the session.

name: ai_usage_late_ratio
description: Share of AI prompts sent in the last quarter of the session.

name: iteration_cycle_count
description: Count of edit-run-review cycles.

name: avg_cycle_duration
description: Average seconds per edit-run-review cycle.

name: focus_switch_count
description: Count of foreground app switches.

name: browser_to_editor_ratio
description: Focused browser time divided by focused editor time.

name: idle_ratio
description: Idle seconds divided by session duration.
